text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
A Fan Fest featuring a variety of events is held
for the Umamusume's most ardent supporters.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Taiki Shuttle is all pumped up for the festivities,
hoping to keep her fans entertained.

text_block_list.name: Taiki Shuttle
text_block_list.text:
Yeehaw! The energy here is really buzzing!
Everybody looks like they're havin' a blast!

text_block_list.name: Taiki Shuttle
text_block_list.text:
And my time to shine is comin' up soon! I'm gonna
put big smiles on everybody's faces!

text_block_list.name: Taiki Shuttle
text_block_list.text: Heh-heh... I'll be runnin' in a pretty exciting race!

text_block_list.name: Taiki Shuttle
text_block_list.text:
It's called the Carrot Crunch Dash. Ya gotta get
to the finish line after eatin' all the carrots in your
way!

text_block_list.name: Taiki Shuttle
text_block_list.text:
I know how to run, and I sure know how to eat! I'm
shootin' for victory!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text: The carrot dash eventually sets into motion...

text_block_list.name: Event Commentator
text_block_list.text: Everyone is off to a beautiful start! But who among them knows how best to maintain their speed and appetite?!

text_block_list.name: Tazuna Hayakawa
text_block_list.text:
Taiki Shuttle has had great results on both turf
and dirt. I'm looking forward to seeing how she
does today.
choice_data_list: She won't lose, no matter the race.

text_block_list.name: Tazuna Hayakawa
text_block_list.text:
Hehe, I'm starting to understand how she's made
it this far.

text_block_list.name: Tazuna Hayakawa
text_block_list.text: She has such a trusting trainer by her side.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
It's necessary for both trainer and Umamusume to
be in sync. Without trust, I won't be able to make
her dream a reality.

text_block_list.name: Event Commentator
text_block_list.text:
Our participants will arrive at their first carrot
shortly! They must finish the whole thing before
they can move on!

text_block_list.name: Event Commentator
text_block_list.text:
Each racer has launched into a clean, precise
jump to snatch their carrot out of the air!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Taiki latches onto the carrot hanging above her
lane and starts eating it.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text: This should be child's play for her—she's an Umamusume who can speed down a track and through a meal!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text: Or so I thought...

text_block_list.name: Taiki Shuttle
text_block_list.text: Whoa! This carrot is so delicious!

text_block_list.name: Event Commentator
text_block_list.text:
What a development! Everyone has slowed down
considerably!

text_block_list.name: Tazuna Hayakawa
text_block_list.text:
Don't tell me... Were those carrots brought in
from Aichi?!

text_block_list.name: Tazuna Hayakawa
text_block_list.text:
They're carrots of fable, laden with
sugar—supposedly sweeter than watermelons...

text_block_list.name: Tazuna Hayakawa
text_block_list.text:
They taste even sweeter the more you chew, until
all you want to do is continue savoring their
flavor.

text_block_list.name: Tazuna Hayakawa
text_block_list.text:
With something so exquisite on the track... we
may no longer have a race on our hands!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
I'm not a hundred percent sure what's going on,
but judging by Tazuna's reaction, finishing the
carrots is likely no easy feat.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text: And so...

text_block_list.name: Taiki Shuttle
text_block_list.text: Oh... I lost. That carrot was just too darn tasty...

text_block_list.name: Taiki Shuttle
text_block_list.text:
But hey, at least my fans seemed to get a kick
outta the whole shebang!

text_block_list.name: Taiki Shuttle
text_block_list.text:
It was probably just as fun as watchin' a ra—no!
No, no, no! I gotta entertain 'em even more from
here out!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
The Fan Fest has given Taiki a burst of
motivation.

text_block_list.name: Girl A
text_block_list.text: You can do it, Taiki Shuttle!

text_block_list.name: Boy B
text_block_list.text: Go, Taiki! Keep running!

text_block_list.name: Taiki Shuttle
text_block_list.text:
Whoa, what am I doing?! Have I just been standin'
here eating this carrot?!

text_block_list.name: Taiki Shuttle
text_block_list.text: I don't wanna be happy all on my own! I gotta make everybody happy!

text_block_list.name: Event Commentator
text_block_list.text:
Oh, what's this? Taiki Shuttle has taken the lead!
She's running full steam ahead!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text: And so...

text_block_list.name: Taiki Shuttle
text_block_list.text: I'm number one! Thanks for all the support, y'all!

text_block_list.name: Girl A
text_block_list.text: Wow, that was amazing! You're so fast!

text_block_list.name: Boy B
text_block_list.text: Hey, Taiki! I'll cheer you on in your next race too!

text_block_list.name: Taiki Shuttle
text_block_list.text: Okay! I won't let y'all down!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text: Taiki Shuttle has a crowd of fans around her.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
She's steadily sprinting her way into everyone's
hearts.
